title: Space Tourism — Multi-page website
description: Plan your journey beyond Earth with destinations, crew details, and space technology highlights.
tagline: Ship features faster with a clear structure.

home.preTitle: So, you want to travel to
home.heroLead: Let's face it; if you want to go to space, you might as well genuinely go to outer space and not hover kind of on the edge of it.
home.heroHint: Well sit back, and relax because we'll give you a truly out of this world experience!
